svg.text: Claude Code v2.1.88 Context Compaction State Machine
Token Monitoring → Adaptive Compaction Strategies → Post-Compaction State Reset

g.text: Clears to last 1 turn on >1h idle
Prevents PTL errors in CCD (Compressed Context Data)
Format & validate for forked agent processing
Retry on Prompt Token Length error with truncation
Marks compaction boundary in message stream
Stops all retry attempts after 3 consecutive compaction failures. Prevents infinite loops.
Suppress after successful compaction • Clear at start of new attempt • Prevents warning spam during recovery
